subcodes.first_line: Every word that issueth from the Tongue of Grandeur is even as the water of life unto them that are dead, and a path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر کلمه که از لسان عظمت ظاهر میشود بمثابه ماء حیات است از برای مردگان و راه
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
